observations: Hero headline and subheading are clear and well-typeset against the dark background, matching the confident developer tone called for in SEED.md.
Meta banner is present at the very top of the page with visible link text, satisfying the honesty requirement about the site's generated origins.
Version badge renders clearly in the navbar alongside the RootSpec wordmark.
Problem section cards (Spec Drift, AI Hallucinations, No Single Source of Truth, Unverifiable Output) render in a clean two-column grid with readable text.
Both CTA buttons are consistently sized, well-contrasted, and aligned — no awkward wrapping visible in the captured viewport widths.
